# daytona_unsuspend_organization (Action)

Unsuspends a Daytona organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "daytona_unsuspend_organization" "example" {
  config {
    organization_id = "organization-id"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID.
